empty.title: No ELO Calculation Templates
empty.description: Create your first template to customize how player statistics influence ELO adjustments

delete.title: Delete ELO Template
delete.message: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.
delete.defaultProtected: The default "pure-win-loss" template cannot be deleted.

adjustment.none: Per‑match stat adjustment: none (0; result‑only ELO)
adjustment.uncapped: Per‑match stat adjustment: uncapped (use with care)
adjustment.range: Per‑match stat adjustment range: {{min}} to {{max}} ELO

importModal.title: Import ELO Templates from JSON
importModal.introTitle: Paste JSON with ELO template definitions below.
importModal.introBody: Expected format: array of templates with name, optional description, enabled, weights, maxAdjustment, and minAdjustment. If you omit id, it will be generated from the name.

editor.info: Configure how individual player statistics influence ELO adjustments. Weights are applied after OpenSkill calculates the base ELO change (win/loss). Positive weights increase ELO, negative weights decrease it.
editor.nameDefaultLocked: Default template name cannot be changed
editor.descriptionPlaceholder: Optional description of this template's purpose

weights.title: Stat Weights
weights.subtitle: Adjust the slider for each statistic. Value of 0 means no adjustment for that stat.

limits.title: Adjustment Limits (Optional)
limits.subtitle: Set maximum and minimum ELO adjustments per match to prevent extreme changes.
limits.maxHelper: Maximum positive ELO adjustment per match
limits.minHelper: Maximum negative ELO adjustment per match
